MXNISTRY OF FINANCE Departmant of Revenue (Narcotics Control Bureau) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th November, 19'96 G.S.R. S09(E).--In exercise of the powers conferred by section 9, read with section 76, of the Narcotic Dmgs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1985 (61 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Rules, 1985, namely :- 1 . ( 1 ) These rules may be called the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances (Second Amendment) Rules, 1996. (2) They shall come into force on*e date oftheir publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substance; Rules, 1985, in Schedule I, under heading "IL Psychotropic Substances", serial number 6 relating to Clobazam and the entries relating thereto shall be omitted. [F. No. V18/96-NCB(Coolzl)] V. N.GABA, Desk Officer Note : Tho principal rules published vide G.S.R. 837 (E) dated 14th Novanibar, 1985 were subsequently amended vide S . 0 . 786(E) dated 26-10-1 992, S.O. 599(E) dated 10-8-1993, aSR748(E) dated 14-12-1993, GSR 543 dated 24- 10- 1994. GSR 82 dated 14-2-1995, GSR 356(E) dated 14-7-1995 and GSR 25(E) dated 12-1-1996. Printad by the Manqer. Oovt. of India Prosx, Ring Road.
